name: StatusCake
description: Monitor StatusCake uptime checks, SSL monitoring, and alert contact group configurations for compliance evidence.

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in StatusCake dashboard under Integrations & API > API.

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verifies that StatusCake has active uptime monitoring checks configured and running.

checks.name: TLS / HTTPS
checks.description: Verifies that SSL monitoring checks are configured in StatusCake to track certificate validity.

checks.name: Incident Response
checks.description: Verifies that alert contact groups are configured in StatusCake so monitoring alerts reach the right people.

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies overall uptime performance across all StatusCake uptime checks.
